│ install    Provision a target project: config + Ollama models + tools + sandbox.                                │
│ doctor     Read-only preflight: report environment readiness with copy-paste fixes.                             │
│ validate   Sweep danno.toml's models through the tiered battery and write the report.                           │
│ bench      Run the enabled benchmark suites across danno.toml's models against a harness.                       │
│ benchmark  Benchmark candidate agent CONFIGS for editing performance.                                           │
│ sandbox    Operate the provisioned Docker sandbox.                                                              │
